steps.title: Do not solve for x first
steps.content: The target is $24x$, and the problem gives $4x=3$. Since $$24x=6(4x)$$ multiply the given equation by $6$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The value of $24x$ is $18$, so C is correct. This shortcut avoids fractions from solving $x=\frac{3}{4}$ first.
